spec_match.rationale: The console exposes the current behavior tokens and modifiers: toolbar, tablist, radiogroup, listbox, menu, menubar, none, inline, block, wrap, nowrap, and nomemory.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified generated widgets, DOM readouts, focus logs, keyboard movement, and selection state updates across the representative token combinations.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede describes behavior-first grammar and DOM/ARIA inspection, and the support badge no longer relies on the false focusgroup IDL probe.

edge_cases.rationale: MCP verified toolbar, radiogroup block, tablist nomemory, listbox wrap, menu, menubar, and none behavior, including opt-out none not creating arrow navigation.

references.rationale: The page includes the required ChromeStatus link.

design_system.rationale: Badge text colors use shared variables and the console keeps compact high-contrast controls.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP verification used Chrome Canary 151 with experimental web platform features enabled. Behavior, axis, wrap, nomemory, item-count, generated widgets, focus logs, console, and network checks passed.
